content.rendered:
No, I don’t organize any private Finnish lessons! You could build your own lesson plans using the information below.

The Conjugation of Verbs

LESSON PLANS

Beginner Finnish – A1.1 to A1.3

  • What is level A1?
  • A1: Lesson plan – Family
  • A1: Lesson plan – Furniture and Rooms
  • A1: Lesson plan – Clothing
  • A1: Lesson plan – Body Parts
  • A1: Lesson plan – Daily Routines
  • A1: Lesson plan – In the City

 

Unfortunately, I haven’t felt especially motivated to continue the “lesson plan” suggestions beyond the very basics. I’m sure I’ll get around to it some day.
